accents.name: Brand Orange/Amber
accents.site_context: Logo, primary calls to action, active tabs, emphasized text.
accents.diagram_usage: Primary highlight color. Use for the most important path in a flowchart, active/current states, or highlighting key component outlines.

accents.name: Muted Sage Green
accents.diagram_usage: Semantic color for 'Success', 'Valid', 'Structured Data', or 'Output'. Use for successful process flows or nodes containing validated data.

accents.name: Muted Rose/Pink
accents.diagram_usage: Semantic color for 'Error', 'Vague Inputs', 'Failed States', or 'Blocked Paths'.

accents.name: Soft Mustard Yellow
accents.diagram_usage: Tertiary accent. Use sparingly for 'Pending', 'Processing', or 'Warning' states.

neutrals.name: Dark Charcoal
neutrals.site_context: Main headings and primary body text.
neutrals.diagram_usage: Primary text, main node labels, and solid connecting arrows/lines.

neutrals.name: Medium Gray
neutrals.diagram_usage: Secondary labels, descriptive text, subtle 1px borders, or dotted/dashed secondary relationship lines.

neutrals.name: Warm Light Gray / Beige
neutrals.site_context: Code snippet backgrounds, inactive tabs, UI panels.
neutrals.diagram_usage: Primary fill color for standard boxes and nodes. Provides subtle contrast against the page background.

neutrals.name: Off-White / Paper
neutrals.diagram_usage: Use as the background canvas for the diagram itself to blend seamlessly with the site.

diagramming_guidelines.visual_style: Flat, minimalist, and editorial. Strictly avoid gradients, 3D effects, and drop shadows. Use solid fills and clean strokes.
diagramming_guidelines.typography: Mix clean sans-serif for standard descriptions with monospaced fonts (e.g., JetBrains Mono, Fira Code, Roboto Mono) for component names, code references, and technical labels to match the developer-tool aesthetic.
diagramming_guidelines.borders_and_lines: Keep lines delicate. Use 1px or 2px stroke widths. Avoid harsh, thick #000000 black lines; use Dark Charcoal (#2A2A2A) for primary lines and Medium Gray (#6E6E6E) for borders and secondary paths.
diagramming_guidelines.corners: Avoid sharp 90-degree corners on main diagram shapes. Apply a subtle border-radius (approximately 6px to 8px) to boxes and nodes to mirror the website's UI panels and code blocks.
